reason: Include port field in ready message for port discovery elimination
Make port optional (default 0) so sidecar discovers its own port
Capture actual port from sidecar's ready message
Resolve with actual port from sidecar ready message
Use actual bound port from sidecar for health check URL
Add port to Listener type to match Server.listen return type and prevent undefined access
